name: Print to Screen (Graphics)
asm_code:
mov si, msg_gfx_{ID}
mov bl, {COLOR}
call print_string_gfx_{ID}
jmp after_gfx_{ID}
msg_gfx_{ID} db '{TEXT}', 0
print_string_gfx_{ID}:
    pusha
.loop:
    lodsb
    or al, al
    jz .done
    mov ah, 0x0e
    int 0x10
    jmp .loop
.done:
    popa
    ret
after_gfx_{ID}:
